overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game, walking from a dark exterior corridor with red neon lighting into a luxurious modern lounge featuring a large animated holographic fish. The environment features high-end ray-traced reflections, glass architecture, and contrasting cyan and red neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered exterior walkway with red neon lighting

events.description: approaching the glass entrance of the building, interior lighting becomes visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dark covered corridor illuminated by red neon pillars, approaching a glass building entrance

entered.detail: dark covered walkway with smooth concrete flooring and overhead beams
tall vertical red neon light strips mounted on concrete pillars
metal luggage cart with stacked suitcases parked against the wall
modern glass wall entrance with reflections of interior lighting
tall metal security gate with vertical bars at the entrance threshold

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dark, covered exterior walkway illuminated by striking red neon vertical lights. A luggage cart sits to the right as the camera approaches a modern glass building entrance, with the interior's warm lighting visible through the transparent facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury hotel lounge with holographic art installation

events.description: passing through metal security gate into the brightly lit interior lounge
holographic display transforms from blue sphere into a large orange koi fish
camera circles around the holographic fish as it swims through the air

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge and circling around the central holographic display to observe it from multiple angles

entered.detail: glowing cyan neon light strips running along the ceiling in geometric patterns
large spherical holographic display that transforms into an animated koi fish
round black marble coffee table with reflective surface and items on top
sleek modern sofa with red accent lighting underneath
decorative metal grate partition with hanging ornaments
floor-to-ceiling glass windows showing dark city exterior with building lights

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a luxurious lounge with polished red floors and cyan neon ceiling lights. A large holographic projection dominates the center, initially appearing as a blue sphere before transforming into a glowing orange koi fish that swims through the air. The camera circles the display, revealing modern furniture, glass walls with city views, and decorative metal partitions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moody, red-lit exterior corridor into a luminous, high-tech luxury lounge. It begins by gliding through a dark covered walkway illuminated by vertical red neon strips, passing a luggage cart as it approaches a transparent glass facade. As the camera crosses the threshold into the building, the atmosphere shifts from the dim exterior to a polished interior featuring reflective red floors and cyan neon ceiling lights. The scene then opens up around a central holographic projection that transforms from a blue sphere into a glowing orange koi fish swimming through the air. Finally, the camera circles the holographic display, revealing sleek modern furniture and glass walls that overlook a sprawling city skyline.
